item.title: KangarooX kernel for vili [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: KangarooX kernel for vili [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: ktommy91
item.itunes:summary:
KangarooX kernel for vili
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
KangarooX kernel for Xiaomi 11T Pro (vili)
Features:
Latest CLO base
Linux and F2FS upstream merged
Built with Weeb clang 17 with O3, polly and THINLTO optimizations
Debloated base, many tracing, logging, debugging are removed
Exfat,NTFS support
FQ_Codel net scheduler in use
Westwood and BBR TPC algorithms enabled
Wireguard
HBM and Dimlayer support
Updated LZ4,ZSTD and LZ4 zRAM by default
Touchscreen high polling rate support
ssg ioscheduler
KernelSU support
Multi-generational LRU
Many backports for good performance

Credits to:
Divyanshu-Modi, tanz3, chemusqui1, hypeartist, arter97, kerneltoast, Kaz205 and many others

Telegram group: https://t.me/kangarooxvili
[read more]
item.description:
KangarooX kernel for vili
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
KangarooX kernel for Xiaomi 11T Pro (vili)
Features:

Built with Weeb clang 17 with O3, polly and THINLTO optimizations
Debloated base, many tracing, logging, debugging are removed

Telegram group: https://t.me/kangarooxvili

item.content:encoded:
KangarooX kernel for vili
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
KangarooX kernel for Xiaomi 11T Pro (vili)
Features:
Latest CLO base
Linux and F2FS upstream merged
Built with Weeb clang 17 with O3, polly and THINLTO optimizations
Debloated base, many tracing, logging, debugging are removed
Exfat,NTFS support
FQ_Codel net scheduler in use
Westwood and BBR TPC algorithms enabled
Wireguard
HBM and Dimlayer support
Updated LZ4,ZSTD and LZ4 zRAM by default
Touchscreen high polling rate support
ssg ioscheduler
KernelSU support
Multi-generational LRU
Many backports for good performance

Pen Drive Files Undelete

item.title: USB Drive File Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive File Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendrivedata
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive File Recovery
(Utilities)
USB Drive File Recovery software to regains or restores deleted or formatted images, folders, photo, memorable historical places photographs, wallpapers or more from physically damage or destroy pen drive, memory stick, jet flash drive or thumb devices etc. Lost Image retrieval application provides user friendly GUI interface for non technical user easily drive to restoration program without any training or supports and to restore deleted or lost data folders from any removable storages media. Formatted Images restoration utility to download demo file on www.data-recovery-usb-drive.com and to revive missing or lost photo, wallpapers, data, audio or video from any corrupted pen drive, key drive, usb devices or memory stick. Lost Wallpapers recovery software to recovers or regain accidentally formatted images, photos, memorable wedding or birthday photographs from any physically damage memory stick, key drive, flash drive, pen drive or thumb drive. Formatted Audio file retrieval program provides perfect option to recovers or revives deleted or virus infected folders from any damage USB removable data storage media. Easy to use Photo restoration utility provides safe or secure way to restore or revives formatted or lost images, files likes mp3, mp4, avi, bmp, jpeg, mpeg, gif or jpg from any logically corrupted pen drive, memory stick, key drive, flash drive or other removable data storage devices in short time of duration.Important feature:*Highly technical missing photo restoration program provides option to recovers lost images, wallpapers from any physically damage pen drive.*Effective or Efficient file recovery software provides facility to regain deleted important data folders from any logically corrupted USB devices.*Easy to use image retrieval software provides option to restore missing photographs from any removable data storage media.*comprehensive deleted photographs recovery program to recovers missing data files from destroy pen drive.

[read more]

item.title: Recover Photos on Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Photos on Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Photos on Mac
(Utilities)
Have you missing your precious video clipping, cute baby video snaps and marriage anniversary photographs? Don’t worry, DRPU Company provide unique Recover Photos on Mac software to solve your problems in reliability, affordable and cost effective manners. Comprehensive digital camera data recovery software successfully renovates your memorable digital photographs including all popular extension files similar to jpeg, tiff, wmf, exif, gif, jpg, avi, bmp, emf, mpeg, mov, midi, wav, jpeg and others. Powerful Recover Photos on Mac application supports all admired type digital camera devices like Professional Camera, Digital video camera, Prosumer digital camera, Novelty camera, Ultra Compact Digital Camera, Specialty camera, Point and shoot camera and more other available in markets. MAC camera data retrieval program presents finest and attractive graphic interface from that novice operator can smoothly handle advance image recovery tool without special technical skills. Powerful Recover Photos on Mac application for Apple Macintosh OS X application firstly restore lost valuable digital data from all foremost data loss cases similar to formatted digital camera storage media, Improper digital device handling, inaccessible Digital Camera, Accidentally deleted due to human mistakes, Virus generated data loss, software, hardware malfunctions and battery failures. Digital Camera data recovery software for Mac allow to download free trial demo version to distinguish premium aspects and powerful working capabilities before purchasing powerful Recover Photos on Mac software.Software extraordinary features: * Excellent Recover Photos on Mac application easily rescue erased or missing audio-video snaps and memorable photographs from digital video camera in convenient way. * Mac digital camera recovery software supports all major image extension files like mepg, midi, emf, tiff, jpeg, wmf etc. * Advance MAC data recovery utility usages little system needs for installation.

[read more]

item.title: Fat Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Fat Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendrivedata
item.itunes:summary:
Fat Recovery Program
(Utilities)
Want to get back missing folders from FAT 16 file system in just minimal time require? Then install outstanding Fat Recovery Program that recovers vanished folders from hard disk drive in user's convenient way even if Windows recycle bin emptied or files deleted using shift + delete keys. FAT 32 File system recover missing folders even if error massage Drive not formatted is displayed on computer system screen.

[read more]

item.title: Undelete Pictures [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Undelete Pictures [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Undelete Pictures
(Utilities)
Download advance featured digital snap salvage software from www.undelete.co.in website to restore valuable image gallery that is deleted from recycle bin folder. Cost effective Undelete Pictures application provides thumbnail preview of all recoverable photographs before applying final revival process. Digital photo rescue tool free demo version is easily installed from www.undelete.co.in website that is useful to get back all missing pictures from hard disk, pen drive, memory cards or other kind of storage devices. Professional and affordable Undelete Pictures utility easily works in major data loss conditions like system crash, software failure, user mistake, power failure etc to regain misplaced photos. Digital Photo Recovery application provides recovery after an accidental deletion data, format or corrupted media. User can Recover corrupted, lost, deleted, or formatted data including JPEG, JPG, GIF, THMB, BMP and many more.

[read more]

WarNet Life 2 APK 1.0.10 is an excellent entertainment application for those who love online gaming. With this version, players can experience unlimited in-game money, facilitating equipment purchases, character upgrades, and participation in game activities effortlessly. WarNet Life 2 offers players a colorful virtual world where they can meet, socialize, and compete with gamers worldwide. With stunning graphics and smooth gameplay mechanics, WarNet Life 2 promises to provide you with enjoyable and engaging entertainment moments. Download now and explore!

item.title: Apple iPod Files Recovery Ex [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Apple iPod Files Recovery Ex [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Apple iPod Files Recovery Ex
(Utilities)
Apple iPod files rescue utility is helpful in recovery of all your favorite music, pictures, songs, video files and folders lost due to accidental deletion, formatting, corruption or improper handling of your iPod music player. Apple iPod files recovery software supports all audio video file formats including mp3, aac, midi, mov, wav, Apple Lossless, MPEG-4, Quick Time etc and also retrieves damaged picture file formats like JPEG, BMP, GIF, TIFF and PNG etc. iPod music restoration tool recovers lost data from all major Apple iPods including iPod Mini, iPod Nano, iPod Touch, iPod Shuffle, iPod Classic, iPod first generation to next generation series and other similar audio video models. Apple iPod files rescue application runs efficiently under all Microsoft Windows operating system including Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8. iPod music recovery tool recovers erased songs, pictures even if data reset operation is performed in your iPod. iPod data retrieval utility also recovers data deleted during transfer of files from iPod music player to PC. iPod files recovery software is easy to use and cost effective application supports quick recovery of missing images and music files. Features: * iPod data rescue software recovers deleted pictures, songs, video files from your iPod music player in an efficient manner. * iPod music retrieval tool ensures data recovery from accidentally formatted or damaged Apple iPod memory. * Apple iPod files recovery software supports all latest versions of iTunes including iTunes 7. * iPod files rescue utility recovers data even if Drive Not Formatted message is displayed by your computer while accessing iPod drive in My computer. * iPod songs restoration application also retrieves data even if iPod disk partition volume is not recognized by your computer.

[read more]
item.description:
Apple iPod Files Recovery Ex
(Utilities)
Apple iPod files rescue utility is helpful in recovery of all your favorite music, pictures, songs, video files and folders lost due to accidental deletion, formatting, corruption or improper handling of your iPod music player. Apple iPod files recovery software supports all audio video file formats including mp3, aac, midi, mov, wav, Apple Lossless, MPEG-4, Quick Time etc and also retrieves damaged picture file formats like JPEG, BMP, GIF, TIFF and PNG etc. iPod music restoration tool recovers lost data from all major Apple iPods including iPod Mini, iPod Nano, iPod Touch, iPod Shuffle, iPod Classic, iPod first generation to next generation series and other similar audio video models. Apple iPod files rescue application runs efficiently under all Microsoft Windows operating system including Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8. iPod music recovery tool recovers erased songs, pictures even if data reset operation is performed in your iPod. iPod data retrieval utility also recovers data deleted during transfer of files from iPod music player to PC. iPod files recovery software is easy to use and cost effective application supports quick recovery of missing images and music files. Features: * iPod data rescue software recovers deleted pictures, songs, video files from your iPod music player in an efficient manner. * iPod music retrieval tool ensures data recovery from accidentally formatted or damaged Apple iPod memory. * Apple iPod files recovery software supports all latest versions of iTunes including iTunes 7. * iPod files rescue utility recovers data even if Drive Not Formatted message is displayed by your computer while accessing iPod drive in My computer. * iPod songs restoration application also retrieves data even if iPod disk partition volume is not recognized by your computer.

[read more]

Apple iPod files recovery software supports all audio video file formats including mp3, aac, midi, mov, wav, Apple Lossless, MPEG-4, Quick Time etc and also retrieves damaged picture file formats like JPEG, BMP, GIF, TIFF and PNG etc. iPod music restoration tool recovers lost data from all major Apple iPods including iPod Mini, iPod Nano, iPod Touch, iPod Shuffle, iPod Classic, iPod first generation to next generation series and other similar audio video models. Apple iPod files rescue application runs efficiently under all Microsoft Windows operating system including Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8. iPod music recovery tool recovers erased songs, pictures even if data reset operation is performed in your iPod. iPod data retrieval utility also recovers data deleted during transfer of files from iPod music player to PC. iPod files recovery software is easy to use and cost effective application supports quick recovery of missing images and music files. item.title: iMeetzu APK 1.0.2 Download For Android Latest Version [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: iMeetzu APK 1.0.2 Download For Android Latest Version [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: dfguioyg76
item.itunes:summary:
iMeetzu APK 1.0.2 Download For Android Latest Version
(Various Games)
iMeetzu APK 1.0.2 is a social networking and online video chat application, offering users a fresh and exciting experience of meeting new people. With a simple and user-friendly interface, iMeetzu allows users to search for and connect with strangers from around the world.
The app provides various attractive features such as live video chat, text chat, and the ability to search for users based on interests and geographical location. Users can join public chat rooms or create private conversations with friends or new acquaintances.

With iMeetzu APK 1.0.2, you can meet and interact with new people every day, opening up opportunities for socializing and making friends on an engaging and diverse chat platform.
[read more]

item.title: USB Drive Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendrivedata
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Recovery
(Utilities)
www.data-recovery-usb-drive.com website provides drive rescue tool which helps to rescue missing documents and save to user specified location. Inexpensive USB Drive Recovery application retrieves music files deleted from logically crashed USB media drives. Reliable files retrieval utility is specialized to salvage missing data from removable pen drives of different capacity.

[read more]
